hint: There is no place like home
In the garden and the field
At the zoo and in nature
Tastes good and fills you up
In a world full of wonders
In the house and the garden
Seeds take root and plants grow
Glowing lights in the night sky
Searching every corner of the house
Racing ahead with heart and skill
Leaves and petals drift on air
Stories and songs from times past
On the road around the world
Finish line after a hard fight
Sport keeps you fit and healthy
Find words rooted in wild earth
Wanderlust drives us to the world
Pack your bags and set off
Far away yet feeling at home
Fast strong and full of endurance
